nasb.text: ‘Now as for the flesh of the sacrifice of his thanksgiving peace offerings, it shall be eaten on the day of his offering; he shall not leave any of it over until morning.

esv.text: And the flesh of the sacrifice of his peace offerings for thanksgiving shall be eaten on the day of his offering. He shall not leave any of it until the morning.

cnv.text: “為感恩而獻的平安祭的肉，只能在獻祭那日吃，一點也不可留到早晨。

ccb.text: 至于祭牲的肉，要在献祭的当天吃完，不可留到次日早晨。
